Video.summary: We shorten Cream Puff's frame, show you our short bed options, and then start the new bed assembly.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Video.summary: Dirt & Trails kicks off with a 1987 Land Cruiser and a 1994 F-150, affectionately named Project Leadfoot.
Video.title: Welcome to Dirt and Trails

Image.alt: Welcome to Dirt and Trails
Welcome to Dirt and Trails
Welcome to Dirt and Trails

Video.summary: Project Leadfoot gets a new roll cage, then upgrades to the lift, suspension, steering and brakes.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit

Image.alt: Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit
Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit
Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit

Video.summary: We bring in a 2001 ragged out BMW 4 door sedan, with plans of turning it into a mix-use race machine.
Video.title: Track Killing Bimmer – Project UnSanctioned Part 1

Image.alt: Track Killing Bimmer – Project UnSanctioned Part 1
Track Killing Bimmer – Project UnSanctioned Part 1
Track Killing Bimmer – Project UnSanctioned Part 1

Video.summary: We pick up the power plant for their grassroots racer and start assembling the heart of the beast.
Video.title: Power Source – Project UnSanctioned Part 2

Image.alt: Power Source – Project UnSanctioned Part 2
Power Source – Project UnSanctioned Part 2
Power Source – Project UnSanctioned Part 2

Video.summary: The Carcass guys continue the build of their grassroots BMW race car.
Video.title: Fuel Fiasco – Project UnSanctioned Part 3

Image.alt: Fuel Fiasco – Project UnSanctioned Part 3
Fuel Fiasco – Project UnSanctioned Part 3
Fuel Fiasco – Project UnSanctioned Part 3

Video.summary: Our 2001 BMW race car gets a set of coilovers, as well as big brake upgrade.
Video.title: Building the Beast — Project UnSanctioned Part 4

Image.alt: Building the Beast — Project UnSanctioned Part 4
Building the Beast — Project UnSanctioned Part 4
Building the Beast — Project UnSanctioned Part 4

Video.summary: Project UnSanctioned gets the roll cage painted and then back to the shop for a stylistic wrap.
Video.title: Artistry In Motion — Project UnSanctioned Part 5

Image.alt: Artistry In Motion — Project UnSanctioned Part 5
Artistry In Motion — Project UnSanctioned Part 5
Artistry In Motion — Project UnSanctioned Part 5

Video.summary: We build a trans tunnel and wheel tubs in our 72 Super Cheyenne for a lowered stance.

Chevy C-10 - Part 5: Tunnel Vision

Video.summary: We're fitting our 509 cubic inch Big Block into its new 1956 Chevrolet 210 home.
Video.title: ’56 Chevy Goes Gasser

Image.alt: ’56 Chevy Goes Gasser
’56 Chevy Goes Gasser
’56 Chevy Goes Gasser

Video.summary: Our Overlanding 4Runner gets new exhaust and creature comforts to help while exploring the wild.

Image.alt: Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure
Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure
Overlanding Yota Part 4: Time for Adventure

Video.summary: What do you get when you combine a Bug and a UTV? The answer: BajAwesome.

Image.alt: Beetle to BajAwesome
Beetle to BajAwesome
Beetle to BajAwesome

Video.summary: We add a custom fit roll cage, fabricated louvers, and a bunch of style points to this baja style bug.
Video.title: Baja Makeover

Image.alt: Baja Makeover
Baja Makeover
Baja Makeover

Video.summary: Baja Style bug gets a 80's retro style paint job to go along with a long travel suspension.
Video.title: Retro Baja Bug

Image.alt: Retro Baja Bug
Retro Baja Bug
Retro Baja Bug

Video.summary: We show you painting tips on how to properly prep your aging clear coat for paint.
Video.title: Paint Tech on our Spec Miata

Image.alt: Paint Tech on our Spec Miata
Paint Tech on our Spec Miata

Video.summary: We bring in a Datsun 280Z and take a look at how it handles on the road.

Video.summary: We'll start our first single seat buggy with a junkyard Acura motor, 4 wheel steer, custom chassis.

Image.alt: Budget Buggy Part I
Budget Buggy Part I
Budget Buggy Part I

Budget Buggy Part II - King of Hammers Preview

Budget Buggy Part III - Steering Front/Rear Axles

Video.summary: Detroit Muscle begins their journey of bringing a ’69 Plymouth Road Runner back from the brink.
Video.title: ’69 Road Runner Part 1: Suspension Tension

’69 Road Runner Part 1: Suspension Tension

Video.summary: Our ’69 Road Runner, nicknamed Road Burner, gets a Gen III Hemi engine swap.

’69 Road Runner Part 2: Hemi Heart Transplant

’69 Road Runner Part 3: To Paint Or Not To Paint
’69 Road Runner Part 3: To Paint Or Not To Paint

Video.summary: Tommy and Joel give the ’69 Road Runner’s interior a much-needed makeover.

Image.alt: ’69 Road Runner Part 4: Insider Trading
’69 Road Runner Part 4: Insider Trading

Video.summary: We make all the right connections and dash towards the finish line our ’69 Road Runner.

Image.alt: ’69 Road Runner Part 5: Dash to the Finish
’69 Road Runner Part 5: Dash to the Finish

Video.summary: We create a one-of-a-kind emblem and then use some wool to clear up Road Burner’s eyes.
Video.title: ’69 Road Runner Part 6: All Systems Go!

Image.alt: ’69 Road Runner Part 6: All Systems Go!
’69 Road Runner Part 6: All Systems Go!
’69 Road Runner Part 6: All Systems Go!

Video.summary: We are going to show how mother nature’s handiwork can create a masterpiece worthy of a Hot Wheel.
Video.title: ’69 Road Runner Part 7: School’s Out!

Image.alt: ’69 Road Runner Part 7: School’s Out!
’69 Road Runner Part 7: School’s Out!

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle guys slam over a 1,000 horsepower into a huge mid-70’s Mercury with a sadistic streak.

Image.alt: The Highwayman: Marquis to the Max
The Highwayman: Marquis to the Max
The Highwayman: Marquis to the Max

Video.summary: The Mercury build continues with ignition, exhaust upgrade and fuel system to handle a 1000 horsepower.
Video.title: The Highwayman: Part II

Image.alt: The Highwayman: Part II
The Highwayman: Part II
The Highwayman: Part II

Video.summary: Adding an indestructible 9-inch and air suspension to our sleeper 1,080-horse ’72 Marquis Brougham
Video.title: The Highwayman: Monster Mercury

Image.alt: The Highwayman: Monster Mercury
The Highwayman: Monster Mercury
The Highwayman: Monster Mercury

Video.summary: The guys button up the last few details on their 1100 horsepower Mercury Monster and take her for a spin.

Video.summary: We introduce our Low-Fi S-10 project and look at the history of the Mini Truck Slam world.

Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project

Video.summary: We're testing our new C-10 project, putting this old Chevy on a wild ride to plan our custom cruiser upgrades.

Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
